name: Odoo CRM Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo CRM including predictive lead scoring (Naive Bayes), lead mining, lead enrichment, partner autocomplete, pipeline management, sales automation, and marketing attribution.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and mail framework

capabilities.name: Predictive Lead Scoring
capabilities.description: Naive Bayes ML model trained on historical conversion data. Configure PLS variables, rebuild frequency tables, interpret probability scores. Formula: P(Won|values) ∝ ∏ P(value|Won)×P(Won). Batch compute step=50000, update step=5000.

capabilities.name: IAP Lead Mining
capabilities.description: Generate leads from external B2B database via DnB API. Filter by country, industry, company size, role, seniority. 1 credit/lead + 1/contact. Endpoint: /api/dnb/1/search_by_criteria.

capabilities.name: IAP Lead Enrichment
capabilities.description: Enrich leads with business data via Clearbit API. Auto-enrich on create or manual per-lead. 1 credit/enrichment. Skips generic email providers.

capabilities.name: Partner Autocomplete
capabilities.description: Auto-populate company info via DnB. Works on new company contacts only. Endpoints: search_by_name, search_by_vat, enrich_by_duns, enrich_by_domain.

capabilities.name: Pipeline Design
capabilities.description: Multi-stage pipeline with kanban stages, probability tracking, won/lost lifecycle. Stage configuration with rotting thresholds, team-based stages.

capabilities.name: Lead Auto-Assignment
capabilities.description: Weighted random allocation to teams, round-robin to members with preference domains. Daily quota = assignment_max/30 - lead_day_count. Configurable cron.

capabilities.name: Opportunity Management
capabilities.description: Lead-to-opportunity conversion, merge, recurring revenue tracking, expected revenue, prorated MRR.

capabilities.name: Marketing Attribution
capabilities.description: UTM-based campaign/source/medium tracking via utm.mixin. Last-touch attribution model. Campaign IDs, source IDs, medium IDs on every lead.

capabilities.name: Sales Team Management
capabilities.description: Team configuration, member assignment rules, dashboard KPIs, forecast reporting.

limitations: PLS requires sufficient historical won/lost data for meaningful probabilities
IAP services require purchased credit packs
Marketing attribution is last-touch only; no multi-touch models

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial CRM skill based on source code analysis of crm v1.9, crm_iap_mine, crm_iap_enrich, partner_autocomplete
